title: Kazakhstan Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person — Schedule 250.03 (Foreign Housing-Construction Participation and Investment Gold)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "форма 250.03 — Сведения о долевом участии в строительстве недвижимости ... и о наличии инвестиционного золота" (Form 250.03, foreign housing-construction equity participation and investment gold), Appendix 3 to the Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person (Form 250.00, `kz/kgd/declaration-of-assets-and-liabilities`, GOV-4043). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 250.00 whenever the declarant marks gating item 05 (equity participation in housing construction, including outside Kazakhstan) and/or item 06 (possession of investment gold, including outside Kazakhstan) on the main declaration. Approved as Appendix 3 to the Declaration (itself part of Appendix 10 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025), published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 250.03 in full — its own taxpayer-identification header (items 1-2, shared with the other five 250.0X schedules) and both of its own repeating sections: Раздел В housing-construction equity participation (four rows — developer ID, developer name, country code, object location/address, currency code, and amount paid), and a second, identically-labelled Раздел В for investment gold (five rows — weight, country code, currency code, and value) — leaving the three other companion schedules (Forms 250.04, 250.05, and 250.06) disclosed as separate backlog candidates; 250.01, 250.02, and 250.05 have already been authored (GOV-4050, GOV-4064, GOV-4057), per the parent Form 250.00 document's own description. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

authority.name: Комитет государственных доходов Министерства финансов Республики Казахстан (State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan)

source.documentRef: Приложение 3 к Декларации об активах и обязательствах физического лица (форма 250.00), Приложение 10 к приказу Министра финансов Республики Казахстан от 12 ноября 2025 года № 695 — форма 250.03

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-4071, deepening Kazakhstan's Taxes vertical by authoring the fourth of the six disclosed companion schedules to Form 250.00 (250.01, 250.05, and 250.02 already authored via GOV-4050/GOV-4057/GOV-4064). Fetched this cycle: the schedule page image /files/1576/49/199.jpg (curl -k, HTTP 200, 137,704 bytes), read directly and cross-checked against two zoomed crops (one per section). Boundary-checked via its own barcode (2625003010009, encoding form 250.03), consistent with the GOV-4043 cycle's own structure list (199.jpg = Schedule 250.03) and the parent Form 250.00 schema's own VERIFICATION.md. Also re-fetched the order's own full HTML explanatory text (adilet.zan.kz/rus/docs/V2500037390, HTTP 200 this cycle — the GOV-4057 cycle's persistent 504 against this same endpoint did not recur) and read Глава 5 (paragraphs 17-19, "Составление формы 250.03") in full to cross-check every column against its own prose description. The housing-construction section prints exactly four blank entry rows above its own worked example (developer ID 111111111111, name CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, country CA, address "г. Торонто, ул. 184, дом 1, офис 10", currency USD, amount 10000); the investment-gold section prints exactly five blank entry rows above its own worked example (weight 100000, country KZ, currency KZT, value 1000000) — a genuine within-page row-count difference (4 vs 5) between the two sections on this same page, confirmed by direct visual count rather than assumed identical, consistent with the same kind of per-section row-count variation already disclosed for Form 250.02 (3/3/2) and Form 250.05. The page reuses the heading "Раздел В" for both sections (rather than В/С or a) /б) sub-labels), the same form-wide labelling convention the GOV-4057 cycle already confirmed is not a genuine ambiguity — Глава 5's own prose (paragraph 17) names both sections distinctly by their subject matter regardless of the shared on-page heading. Country code (housing-construction column D, investment-gold column C) and currency code (housing-construction column F, investment-gold column D) both cite the same two footnoted classifiers already established across every 250.0X schedule authored so far (Классификатор стран мира, two-letter; Классификатор валют, three-letter, Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010). Amount/value columns (housing-construction column G, investment-gold column E) are printed as млрд/млн/тыс digit-box groups and modelled as a single number field per this registry's established convention for such place-value digit-box groups. A genuine, disclosed modelling judgment call: the investment-gold section's own "Вес золота" (weight) column prints three labelled sub-groups — КГ. (3 digit-boxes), Г. (3 digit-boxes), and МГ. (3 digit-boxes) — followed by a fourth, unlabelled 3-digit-box group with no header text of its own, for 12 digit-boxes total; the worked example (100000) fills only the rightmost six boxes (the labelled МГ. group plus the unlabelled fourth group), leaving the КГ. and Г. groups blank. The order's own explanatory text (paragraph 19, графа В) says only "указывается вес инвестиционного золота" ("the weight of the investment gold is indicated") with no further breakdown, so neither the image nor the prose resolves whether the unlabelled fourth group is a continuation of МГ. (giving a 6-digit milligram sub-value) or a distinct, unlabelled unit of its own. Modelled as three separate numeric fields — `investmentGoldEntryNWeightKg`, `WeightG`, `WeightMg` — mapping the three labelled groups literally (each a 3-digit place, per this registry's digit-box convention), with the fourth, unlabelled group folded into the `WeightMg` field's own description as an open, disclosed ambiguity rather than silently invented as a fourth field or a wider pattern. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The declarant's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 250.00 declaration this schedule is attached to.

fields.name: representedPersonIin
fields.label: ИИН представляемого лица
fields.description: The 12-digit IIN of the minor and/or legally incapacitated person being represented, if this schedule is filed by a legal representative. The schedule page prints only a single IIN box here, unlike the main Form 250.00 declaration's own separate boolean gate and name fields for the same case.

fields.name: currentSheetNumber
fields.label: Укажите номер текущего листа
fields.description: The sequential sheet number of this schedule page, printed in a box at the top right of every page of this schedule (relevant when more than one page is filed to list additional rows).

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry1DeveloperId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер застройщика (строка 1)
fields.description: The identification number of the person (застройщик) registered, including outside the Republic of Kazakhstan, who is a party to the contract obligated to transfer ownership of a residential building or part of one (e.g. an apartment), reported in row 1 of Раздел В (item 05). Per the order's own explanatory text, only official housing-construction equity-participation contracts are reported here — preliminary apartment-booking, apartment-reservation, and investment contracts are explicitly excluded. Worked example: 111111111111.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry1DeveloperName
fields.label: Наименование застройщика (строка 1)
fields.description: The name of the developer/person reported in row 1 of Раздел В (item 05). Worked example: CONSTRUCTION COMPANY.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the country where the developer in row 1 of Раздел В (item 05) is registered, per the Classifier of World Countries (Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010) — the same two-letter classifier already established across every 250.0X schedule. Worked example: CA.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry1ObjectLocation
fields.label: Место нахождения (адрес) объекта (строка 1)
fields.description: The location/address of the object under the housing-construction equity-participation contract reported in row 1 of Раздел В (item 05). Worked example: г. Торонто, ул. 184, дом 1, офис 10.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry1CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 1)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the money paid towards the contract obligations in row 1 of Раздел В (item 05), per the Classifier of Currencies (the same Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission). Worked example: USD.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry1Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 1)
fields.description: The total amount of money paid towards the contract obligations reported in row 1 of Раздел В (item 05), printed on the page as млрд/млн/тыс place-value digit-box groups and modelled here as a single numeric amount, per this registry's established convention for such digit-box groups. Worked example: 10000.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry2DeveloperId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер застройщика (строка 2)
fields.description: The identification number of the developer/person reported in row 2 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1DeveloperId for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry2DeveloperName
fields.label: Наименование застройщика (строка 2)
fields.description: The name of the developer/person reported in row 2 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1DeveloperName for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the developer in row 2 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry2ObjectLocation
fields.label: Место нахождения (адрес) объекта (строка 2)
fields.description: The location/address of the object reported in row 2 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1ObjectLocation for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry2CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 2)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the money paid in row 2 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry2Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 2)
fields.description: The total amount of money paid towards the contract obligations reported in row 2 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1Amount for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry3DeveloperId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер застройщика (строка 3)
fields.description: The identification number of the developer/person reported in row 3 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1DeveloperId for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry3DeveloperName
fields.label: Наименование застройщика (строка 3)
fields.description: The name of the developer/person reported in row 3 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1DeveloperName for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry3CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 3)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the developer in row 3 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry3ObjectLocation
fields.label: Место нахождения (адрес) объекта (строка 3)
fields.description: The location/address of the object reported in row 3 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1ObjectLocation for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry3CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 3)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the money paid in row 3 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry3Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 3)
fields.description: The total amount of money paid towards the contract obligations reported in row 3 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1Amount for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry4DeveloperId
fields.label: Идентификационный номер застройщика (строка 4)
fields.description: The identification number of the developer/person reported in row 4 of Раздел В (item 05) — the fourth and last blank entry row printed on this section of the page. See housingConstructionEntry1DeveloperId for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry4DeveloperName
fields.label: Наименование застройщика (строка 4)
fields.description: The name of the developer/person reported in row 4 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1DeveloperName for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry4CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 4)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the developer in row 4 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry4ObjectLocation
fields.label: Место нахождения (адрес) объекта (строка 4)
fields.description: The location/address of the object reported in row 4 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1ObjectLocation for the full description.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry4CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 4)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code of the money paid in row 4 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: housingConstructionEntry4Amount
fields.label: Сумма (строка 4)
fields.description: The total amount of money paid towards the contract obligations reported in row 4 of Раздел В (item 05). See housingConstructionEntry1Amount for the full description.

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry1WeightKg
fields.label: Вес золота, кг (строка 1)
fields.description: The whole-kilogram component of the weight of the investment gold reported in row 1 of the second Раздел В (item 06), printed as a 3-digit-box group labelled "КГ.". Disclosed modelling judgment call: the printed weight column also has an unlabelled fourth 3-digit-box group after "МГ." (see investmentGoldEntry1WeightMg), which this schema folds into the milligram field rather than inventing a separate unit for — the order's own explanatory text (paragraph 19) gives no further breakdown beyond "указывается вес инвестиционного золота" ("the weight of the investment gold is indicated"). Worked example: 0 (blank on the page).
fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 06), row 1, column B (КГ. group)

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry1WeightG
fields.label: Вес золота, г (строка 1)
fields.description: The whole-gram component of the weight of the investment gold reported in row 1 of the second Раздел В (item 06), printed as a 3-digit-box group labelled "Г.". Worked example: 0 (blank on the page).
fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 06), row 1, column B (Г. group)

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry1WeightMg
fields.label: Вес золота, мг (строка 1)
fields.description: The milligram component of the weight of the investment gold reported in row 1 of the second Раздел В (item 06), printed as a 3-digit-box group labelled "МГ." immediately followed by a fourth, unlabelled 3-digit-box group. This field folds both groups into a single up-to-6-digit milligram value, since neither the page image nor the order's own explanatory text (paragraph 19) resolves whether the unlabelled fourth group is a continuation of "МГ." or a distinct unit of its own — disclosed here rather than silently assumed. Worked example: 100000 (the worked example fills only these two rightmost 3-digit groups, leaving КГ. and Г. blank).
fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 06), row 1, column B (МГ. group + unlabelled fourth group)

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of registration of the investment gold reported in row 1 of the second Раздел В (item 06), per the Classifier of World Countries — the same two-letter classifier already established across every 250.0X schedule. The order's own explanatory text literally reads "код страны регистрации инвестиционного золота" ("country code of registration of the investment gold"), an unusual phrase for a physical commodity rather than a registered account or entity; transcribed verbatim rather than reinterpreted. Worked example: KZ.

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry1CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 1)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code in which the investment gold in row 1 of the second Раздел В (item 06) was acquired, per the Classifier of Currencies. Worked example: KZT.

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry1Value
fields.label: Сумма (строка 1)
fields.description: The value of the investment gold reported in row 1 of the second Раздел В (item 06), printed on the page as млрд/млн/тыс place-value digit-box groups and modelled here as a single numeric amount, per this registry's established convention for such digit-box groups. Worked example: 1000000.

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry2WeightKg
fields.label: Вес золота, кг (строка 2)
fields.description: The whole-kilogram component of the weight of the investment gold reported in row 2 of the second Раздел В (item 06). See investmentGoldEntry1WeightKg for the full description.
fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 06), row 2, column B (КГ. group)

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry2WeightG
fields.label: Вес золота, г (строка 2)
fields.description: The whole-gram component of the weight of the investment gold reported in row 2 of the second Раздел В (item 06). See investmentGoldEntry1WeightG for the full description.
fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 06), row 2, column B (Г. group)

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry2WeightMg
fields.label: Вес золота, мг (строка 2)
fields.description: The milligram component of the weight of the investment gold reported in row 2 of the second Раздел В (item 06). See investmentGoldEntry1WeightMg for the full description, including the disclosed unlabelled-fourth-group ambiguity.
fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 06), row 2, column B (МГ. group + unlabelled fourth group)

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of registration of the investment gold reported in row 2 of the second Раздел В (item 06). See investmentGoldEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry2CurrencyCode
fields.label: Код валюты (строка 2)
fields.description: The three-letter currency code in which the investment gold in row 2 of the second Раздел В (item 06) was acquired. See investmentGoldEntry1CurrencyCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry2Value
fields.label: Сумма (строка 2)
fields.description: The value of the investment gold reported in row 2 of the second Раздел В (item 06). See investmentGoldEntry1Value for the full description.

fields.name: investmentGoldEntry3WeightKg
fields.label: Вес золота, кг (строка 3)
fields.description: The whole-kilogram component of the weight of the investment gold reported in row 3 of the second Раздел В (item 06). See investmentGoldEntry1WeightKg for the full description.
fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 06), row 3, column B (КГ. group)

fields.label: Вес золота, г (строка 3)
fields.description: The whole-gram component of the weight of the investment gold reported in row 3 of the second Раздел В (item 06). See investmentGoldEntry1WeightG for the full description.

fields.sourceRef: Раздел В (item 06), row 4, column B (КГ. group)
